message:
fix: bump fsqlite to 7ca6ff1 (fixes B-tree cursor, page-count header)

Picks up frankensqlite fixes:
- Fix BTree cursor seek successor positioning and interior page insertion
  (fixes #112: "cursor must be on a leaf to delete")
- Patch page_count in SQLite header on commit (fixes #111: corrupt
  page-count header making DBs unreadable by standard SQLite)
- Skip eager rewrite of correlated scalar subqueries
- Add migrate module (previously uncommitted)

Closes #111, closes #112, closes #113

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
